creator: jkim@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tuesday 06 November 2007 08:50 pm, Pav Lucistnik wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/117826; it has been noted
> by GNATS.
>
> From: Pav Lucistnik <pav@FreeBSD.org>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
> Cc:
> Subject: Re: ports/117826: [PATCH] audio/oss: fix plist and unbreak
> Date: Wed, 07 Nov 2007 02:14:11 +0100
>
>  Then it has to be removed by pkg-deinstall or by @exec in
> pkg-plist.

The file contains user configurable settings.  I didn't want to remove 
it during upgrades:

http://docs.freebsd.org/cgi/mid.cgi?200710121613.l9CGDEHi062480

Jung-uk Kim
